title: SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026 Overview

detail.title: SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET Admission 2026 registration is open from May 21 to June 10, 2026. Check eligibility, application fee (₹600), exam date (July 12), exam pattern and step-by-step application process for Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed.) 2026-28 at scertpet.co.in.

content.text: SCERT Assam has officially commenced online registration for D.El.Ed PET Admission 2026 for the 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed.) programme for the academic session 2026-2028. The Pre-Entry Test (PET) serves as the entrance examination for admission into government and private Elementary Teacher Education Institutes (ETEIs) across Assam. Candidates can apply online at scertpet.co.in till June 10, 2026.

This complete guide provides all essential information including important dates, eligibility criteria, application process, exam pattern, syllabus highlights, and direct links to help aspirants successfully apply for SCERT Assam D.El.Ed Admission 2026.

sections.heading: SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026 Important Dates

rows: Last Date for Submission of Application

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026

rows: Must be a permanent resident of Assam
18 to 34 years (Relaxation of 2 years for SC/ST(P)/ST(H))
Passed Higher Secondary (10+2) or equivalent with minimum 50% marks (45% for SC/ST(P)/ST(H))

content.text: Mode of Payment: Online (Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card / UPI)

sections.heading: How to Apply for SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Click on “New Registration” and register with a valid mobile number and email.
Fill in personal, academic, and contact details accurately.
Upload scanned copies of required documents.
Pay the application fee of ₹600 online.
Submit the form and take a printout of the confirmation page for future reference.

content.text: Apply Online for SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026

links.text: Apply Online for SCERT Assam D.El.Ed PET 2026
